title: zornia diphylla var. thymifolia
intro: Zornia diphylla var. thymifolia, commonly known as Thyme-leaf Zornia, is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae, characterized by its unique thyme-like leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and wounds. The health benefits of Zornia diphylla var. thymifolia include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate fever, and promote digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its herbal remedies, with the leaves being used fresh or dried for its medicinal applications.
